content: We can reframe the task-agnostic Self-Refine framework as a meta-structure to unify fragmented LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where each distinct self-reflection perspective (such as the inconsistent solving perspective from Self-Contrast) becomes an iterative feedback step for refining the LLM's output instead of a standalone correction tool. This creates a cascaded multi-perspective self-refinement system that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data.
